Do not retry the same key, replace the working x402 key, open the portal, or request SMS codes. Wait for CDP_REMEDY_API_KEY_ID, CDP_REMEDY_API_KEY_SECRET, and CDP_REMEDY_WALLET_SECRET, then provision one unfunded remedy account with the official CLI. No funds move without separate explicit approval. Never count owner, controlled-wallet, testnet, CI, demo, or monitoring activity. Stripe remains regression-only.
